title: Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair kept US interest rates steady, despite pressure from President Trump. Powell emphasized the Fed's independence
excerpt: Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair kept US interest rates steady, despite pressure from President Trump. Powell emphasized the Fed's independence and will stay until a Trump probe is resolved. Powell's decision was cautious amid inflation fears from the US-Iran conflict.

content.introduction: Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair kept US interest rates steady, despite pressure from President Trump. Powell emphasized the Fed's independence and will stay until a Trump probe is resolved. Powell's decision was cautious amid inflation fears from the US-Iran conflict.
body: # Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair. The Federal Reserve has held US interest rates steady after what was expected to be Jerome Powell's final meeting as chair. It followed continued pressure from US President Donald Trump on the Fed to lower interest rates, with the Trump having criticised Powell throughout his presidency. Warsh is expected to face the same pressure from the president, but has vowed to uphold the central bank's independence when he takes over from Powell. After the bank's latest decision on Wednesday, Powell gave a press conference covering topics from the US-Israel war with Iran to Trump's attacks on the Fed. Here are the four key takeaways from a significant day for the future of the US central bank. He said he will stay on at the bank until a Trump administration probe into him and the bank is "well and truly over".

# Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's last rate decision as Fed chair. Powell's conference after holding rates covered the US-Israel war with Iran, inflation, legal attacks, and the Fed's independence. ### World Cup 2026: How much would it cost to go as an England or Scotland fan? ### AI told users it was sentient - it caused them to have delusions. ### Man charged over Australian Outback death of 5-year-old girl. ### King's speech was a 'high stakes' moment of US visit, Palace says. ### Voters will judge Trump on the economy - how is it doing? ### Miami Grand Prix: Lando Norris says drivers 'thrown in deep end' for expected wet race.
